items_fr: ---------------------3. Prie  en  outre le  Conseil  de  tutelle  d'envoyer  sa mission de visite de 1960 clans  les territoires sous tutelle de  l' Afrique  orientale  au  cours  des  premiers  mois  de l'annee,  afin  qu'elle  puisse  faire  rapport  au  Conseil, ]ors  de  sa.  vingt-sixieme  session.  sur  la  situation  qui regne  clans  le  \_Territoire  et  sur  Jes  causes  des  troubles qui  y  ont  eu  lieu  recemment
items_en: ---------------------3. Further requests the Trusteeship Council to send its 1960 visiting mission to the Trust Territories of East Africa during the first months of the year, so that it may report to the Council at its twenty-sixth session on the situation prevailing in the Territory and on the causes of the recent disturbances there

text_fr: 846eme seance  pleniere,
text_en: 846th plenary session,

text_fr: 5 decembre  1959.
text_en: 5 December 1959.

text_fr: 1461  (XIV).  Progres  realises  par  les  territoires non autonomes  en application  des  disposi· tions du Chapitre XI  de la Charle
text_en: 1461 (XIV). Progress made by the Non-Self-Governing Territories pursuant to the provisions of Chapter XI of the Charter

text_fr: L' Assemblee generate,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: Rappelant sa  resolution  932  ( X)  du  8  novembre 1955,  dans laquelle  elle  exprimait  l'avis qu'un examen des progres realises  clans  les  territoires  non  autonomes depuis la creation de !'Organisation des  Nations Unies, examen  fonde  sur  les  renseignements  que  les  Etats Membres  administrants  communiquent  en  vertu  de l'alinea e de l' Article 73  de la  Charte des Nations U nies, serait  extremement  opportun  et  devrait  permettre  de savoir  dans  quelle  mesure  les  populations  des  terri› toires  non  autonomes  progressent  et  approchent  du moment ou Jes  buts du Chapitre X I  de la  Charte seront atteints,
text_en: Recalling its resolution 932 (X) of 8 November 1955, in which it expressed the view that a review of the progress achieved by the Non-Self-Governing Territories since the establishment of the United Nations, based on information provided by the administering Member States under Article 73 e of the Charter of the United Nations, would be extremely timely and should make it possible to ascertain the extent to which the populations of the Non-Self-Governing Territories are progressing and approaching the time when the aims of Chapter X I of the Charter will be achieved,

text_fr: Rappelant  en  outre sa  resolution  1053  ( XI)  du  20 fevrier  1957,  dans  laquelle  elle  invitait  le Secretaire general a rediger,  en  collaboration  avec  les  institutions specialisees  interessees,  un  rapport  sur  Jes progres realises  clans  les  territoires  non  autonomes  clans  les domaines au  sujet desquels  des  renseignements  ont  ete communiques,  conformement  aux  objectifs  du  Cha› pitre  XI de  la  Charte,  depuis  la  creation  de  !'Orga› nisation des Nations U nies,
text_en: Recalling further its resolution 1053 ( XI) of 20 February 1957, in which it invited the Secretary-General to prepare, in cooperation with the specialized institutions concerned, a report on the progress achieved in the Non-Self-Governing Territories in the areas in which information had been communicated, in accordance with the objectives of Chapter XI of the Charter, since the establishment of the Organization of the United Nations,

items_fr: 1. Remercie le  Secretaire  general  et  les  institutions specialisees  du  travail  qu'ils ont accompli  en  redigeant le  rapport  sur  les  progres  realises  dans  les  territoires non autonomes 23 ;

2. Prie le Comite  des  rmseignements  relatifs  aux territoires non autonomes d'examiner le  rapport susvise a sa  prochaine  session,  en  plus  des  questions  prevues par  son  programme  de  travail  ordinaire,  en  vue  de determiner Jes  progres  realises par  les  populations  des territoires  non  autonomes,  compte  tenu  des  objectifs enonces  au  Chapitre  XI  de  la  Charte  des  Nations Unies;

3. Prie  en  outre le  Comite  d~  presenter  ses  obser› vations  et  conclusions  sur  le  rapport a l'Assemblee generate,  !ors  de  sa quinzieme  session,  afin  de  faciliter a l'Assemblee l'examen dudit rapport;

4. Prie le  Comite  de  s'inspirer, dans  !'execution de cette  tache,  des  dispositions  de  tllutes  les  resolutions pertinentes  de  I' Assemblee  genenle,  notamment  des resolutions  932  (X)  et  1053  (XI)  ainsi  que  des  dis› positions du Chapitre XI de  la  Charte.
items_en: 1. Expresses its appreciation to the Secretary-General and the specialized institutions for their work in drafting the report on progress achieved in the Non-Self-Governing Territories; 23

2. Requests the Committee on the rms relating to Non-Self-Governing Territories to consider the report referred to at its next session, in addition to the issues provided for in its regular programme of work, with a view to determining the progress achieved by the peoples of the Non-Self-Governing Territories, taking into account the objectives set out in Chapter XI of the Charter of the United Nations;

3. Further requests the Committee to submit its observations and conclusions on the report to the General Assembly at its fifty-fifth session in order to facilitate the consideration of the report by the Assembly;

4. Requests the Committee, in carrying out this task, to draw inspiration from the provisions of tllutes the relevant resolutions of the General Assembly, in particular resolutions 932 (X) and 1053 (XI), as well as from the provisions of Chapter XI of the Charter.

text_fr: 855eme seance  plenicre, 12  1,ecembre  1959.
text_en: 855th plenary session, 12 December 1959.

text_fr: -------------------------1462  (XIV).  Rapport  sur  la  situation  de  l'ensei· gnement dans  les territoires  non  autonomes
text_en: --------------------------1462 (XIV). Report on the situation of education in the Non-Self-Governing Territories

text_fr: L'Assemblee generale,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: Considerant que,  par  sa  resolutiori  445  (V)  du  12 decembre  1950,  elle  a  approuve  le  rapport  special  sur la  situation  de  l'enseignement  redige  en  1950  par  le Comitc  dt>s  rcnseignements  relatifs  aux  tcrritoires  non autonomes 24 comme  constituant  un  expose  succinct, mais  murement  reflechi,  de  !'importance  des  amelio› rations  clans  le  domaine  de  l'enseignement et  des  pro› hlemes qui  restaient a resoudre dans Jes  territoires noTI autonomes,
text_en: Considering that, by its resolutiori 445 (V) of 12 December 1950, it approved the special report on the situation of education redrafted in 1950 by the Committee on Non-Self-Governing Tcrritories 24 as a succinct but poorly reflected statement of the importance of education and development in the autonomous Non-Self-Governing Territories,

text_fr: Considerant que,  par  sa  resolution  743  (VIII)  du 27 novembre  1953, elle a  approuve  un nouveau rapport sur J'cnseignement 2 ~ qui completait le  rapport approuve en  1950,
text_en: Considering that, by its resolution 743 (VIII) of 27 November 1953, it approved a new report on I'm aware 2~ which completed the report approved in 1950,

text_fr: Considerant que,  par  sa  resolution  1048  (XI)  du 20  fevrier  1957,  elle  a  approuve  un  nouveau  rapport sur  l'enseignement etabli  en  1956 26 ,
text_en: Recognizing that, by its Resolution 1048 (XI) of 20 February 1957, it approved a new report on education drawn up in 1956, 26

text_fr: Prenant acte du rapport que le  Comite des  renseigne› ments  relatifs  aux. territoires  non  autonomes  a  redige en  1959  sur  la  situation  de  l'enseignement  dans  ces territoires 2 7,
text_en: Taking note of the report of the Committee on Information on Non-Self-Governing Territories prepared in 1959 on the situation of education in those Territories 2 7,

items_fr: I. Approuve le rapport  sur  la  situation  de  l'ensei› gnement,  redige  en  1959  par  le  Comite  des  renseigne› ments  relatifs  aux  territoires  non autonomes,  et estime qu'il y  a  lieu  de  l'etudier en  le  rapprochant des  rapports approuves  en  1950,  1953  et  1957;

2. Invite le Secretaire  general a communiquer  le rapport de 1959,  pour examen, aux Etats Membres qui administrent  des  territoires  non  autonomes,  au  Conseil cconomique  et  social,  aux  commissions  economiques regionales,  au  Conseil  de  tutelle  et  aux  institutions specialisees  competentes;

3\_ Est  persuadee que  les  Etats  Membres  qui  admi› nistrent  des  territoires  non  autonomes  signaleront  le rapport a !'.attention des  autorites  responsables  de  l'en› seignement  dans  ces · territoires.
items_en: I. Approves the report on the situation of education, prepared in 1959 by the Committee on Information on Non-Self-Governing Territories, and considers that it should be studied in conjunction with the reports approved in 1950, 1953 and 1957;

2. Invites the Secretary-General to transmit the 1959 report for consideration to Member States administering Non-Self-Governing Territories, the Economic and Social Council, regional economic commissions, the Trusteeship Council and relevant specialized institutions;

3\_ Is convinced that the Member States which are admiring Non-Self-Governing Territories will report the report a !'.attention of the authorities responsible for the en› ignement in these territories.

text_fr: 855eme  seance  pleniere, 12  decembre  1959.
text_en: 855th Plenary Session, 12 December 1959.

text_fr: 1463  (XIV).  Developpement  de  l'enseignement primaire dans Jes  territoires  non  autonomes
text_en: 1463 (XIV). Development of primary education in the Non-Self-Governing Territories

text_fr: L'Assemblee gf:nerale,
text_en: The Gf:nerale Assembly,

text_fr: Rappelant les obligations qui, en vertu de I' Article 73 de  la  Charte des  Nations  U nies,  reviennent  aux  Etats Membres qui administrent des territoires dont les popu› lations ne  s'administrent pas encore completement elles› memes  d'assurer,  en  respectant  la  culture  des  popu› lations  en  question,  leur  progres politique,  economique et social  ainsi que le  developpement de  leur instruction, de  les  traiter  avec  equite  et  de  Jes  proteger  contre les  abus,
text_en: Recalling the obligations which, under Article 73 of the Charter of the United Nations, fall to the Member States which administer territories whose populations are not yet fully administered, to ensure, while respecting the culture of the peoples in question, their political, economic and social progress and the development of their education, to treat them equitably and to protect against abuse,

text_fr: Considerant, clans  !'esprit de  ces  principes,  que,  pour developper l'enseignement primaire et afin de combattre l'analphabetisme  chez  les  populations  des  territoires non  autonomes,  Jes Etats Membres  administrants doivent  s'efforcer de  creer  sur  ces  territoires  des  con-
text_en: In the spirit of these principles, which, in order to develop primary education and to combat an alphabetism among the peoples of the Non-Self-Governing Territories, the administering Member States must endeavour to create con-

text_fr: ditions  non  moins  favorables  que  celles  dont  jouissent les  populations  des  pays  avances,
text_en: no less favourable terms than those enjoyed by the populations of the advanced countries,

text_fr: Reaffirmant ses  resolutions  743  (VIII)  du  27  no› vembre  1953  et  1049  (XI)  du  20  fevrier  1957,  dans lesquelles  elle  recommandait  notamment !'institution ou !'extension de l'enseignement primaire universe!, gratuit et obligatoire  dans  Jes  territoires  non  autonomes,
text_en: Reaffirming its resolutions 743 (VIII) of 27 November 1953 and 1049 (XI) of 20 February 1957, in which it recommended, inter alia, the institution or extension of universal primary education, free and compulsory in my Non-Self-Governing Territories,

text_fr: Constatant, dix ans  apres !'adoption de  la  resolution 330 (IV) du 2 decembre  f949 par laquelle  l'Assemblee generale reconnaissait  que  l'analphabetisme est  l'un des problemes fondamentaux des territoires non autonome.s, que  Jes  progres  enregistres  dans  ce  dornaine  ont  ete tres lents,
text_en: Noting, ten years later, the adoption of Resolution 330 (IV) of 2 December, by which the General Assembly recognized that analphabetism was one of the fundamental problems of the Non-Self-Governing Territories, which Jes progres recorded in this Dornaine were very slow,

text_fr: Ayant note que le Comite des  renseignements relatifs aux  territoires  non  autonomes,  dans  son  rapport  sur la situation de  l'enseignement, s'est vu dans !'obligation de  reaffirmer  !'opinion  qu'il  avait  exprirnee  en  1950, selon  laquelle  la  suppression  de  l'analphabetisme cons› titue dans la majorite des  territoires  non  autonomes  un probleme des  plus pressants 28 ,
text_en: Having noted that the Committee on Information on Non-Self-Governing Territories, in its report on the situation of education, has been obliged to reaffirm its view, which it had expressed in 1950, that the abolition of an alphabetism in the majority of the Non-Self-Governing Territories is a most pressing problem, 28

items_fr: 1. Recommande que  Jes Etats  Membres  adminis› trants  prennent  toutes  Jes  mesures  necessaires  en \_vue de  developper  l'enseignement primaire  des  populat10ns des  territoires  non  autonomes,  afin  que  cet  enseigne› ment  parvienne  le  plus  vite  possible  au  meme  niveau que  celui  des  populations  des  pays  avances;

2. Invite Jes  Etats  Membres  administrants a com› muniquer  au  Secretaire  general,  pour  la  dix-septieme session  de  I' Assemblee  generale,  des  renseignements sur Jes  mesures prises et  les  progres realises  dans  !'ins› titution de l'enseignement primaire universe!,  gratuit et obligatoire,  en  vue  de  supprimer  l'analphabetisme ch~z Jes populations  des  territoires  non  autonomes  qu'1ls administrent.
items_en: 1. Recommends that my administrative Member States take all necessary measures to develop the primary education of the people of the Non-Self-Governing Territories, so that this teaching can reach as soon as possible the same level as that of the populations of the advanced countries;

2. Invites the administering Member States to bring to the Secretary General, for the seventeenth session of the General Assembly, information on the measures taken and the progress made in the establishment of universal primary education, free and compulsory, with a view to eliminating the analphasisism of the Non-Self-Governing Territories which they administer.

text_fr: 855eme  seance  plcniere,
text_en: 855th plenary session,

text_fr: 12  decembre  1959.
text_en: 12 December 1959.

text_fr: 1464  (XIV).  Egalite  de  traitement  en  matiere d'enseignement  dans  les  territoires  non autonomes
text_en: 1464 (XIV). Equal treatment in the field of education in the Non-Self-Governing Territories

text_fr: L' Assemblee generate,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: Rappelant sa  resolution  328  (IV)  du  2  decembre 1949, relative a l'egalite de  traitement  en  matiere d'en› seignement dans Jes  territoires non autonomes, et toutes les  autres  resolutions  pertinentes,
text_en: Recalling its resolution 328 (IV) of 2 December 1949, on equal treatment in matters of en› education in the Non-Self-Governing Territories, and all other relevant resolutions,

text_fr: C onsiderant que  Jes  relations  entre  les  races  pre› sentent,  en  particulier  dans  Jes  conditions  de  la  vie moderne,  une  importance  fondamentale  si  !'on  veut atteindre  Jes  buts  du  Chapitre  XI  de  la  Charte  des Nations  Unies,
text_en: On the basis that Is relations between the pre› races feel, especially in the conditions of modern life, a fundamental importance if!' we want to achieve the aims of Chapter XI of the Charter of the United Nations,

text_fr: Ayant  examine le rapport  special  presente  par  le Comite  des  renseignements  relatifs  aux  territoires  non autonomes 29 ,
text_en: Having considered the special report submitted by the Committee on Information from Non-Self-Governing Territories, 29

text_fr: Reconnaissant que  quelques  progres  ont  ete  realises en ce  qui  concerne  !'egalite  de  traitement  en  matiere d'enseignement clans  Jes  territoires  non  autonomes,
text_en: Recognising that some progress has been made with regard to equal treatment in the field of education in my Non-Self-Governing Territories,

items_fr: 2. Demande  instamment aux  Etats  Membres  admi› nistrants  d'intensifier  leurs  efforts  pour  atteindre  Jes objectifs  fondamentaux  de  ladite  resolution;

3. Fait sienne !'opinion, exprimee par le  Comite  des renseignements  relatifs  aux  territoires  non  autonomes, que rien ne permet de justifier des  systemes d'enseigne› ment fondes  sur la  race 30 ;
items_en: 2. Urges Member States to intensify their efforts to achieve the basic objectives of the resolution;
3. Endorses the opinion expressed by the Committee on Information on Non-Self-Governing Territories that there is no justification for education systems based on race 30;

text_fr: 2s
text_en: 2s

text_fr: Ibid.,
text_en: Ibid.,

text_fr: Zeme  partie,  par.  44.
text_en: Zeme part, para. 44.

text_fr: Ibid.,
text_en: Ibid.,

text_fr: par.  30  a 38.
text_en: paras. 30-38.

items_fr: 4. Prie le Comite  d'accorder une  attention  speciale a cette  question  et  de  mntinuer a mentionner  les  faits marquants  dans  son  rapport  annuel  sur  la  situation dans  les  territoires  non  autonomes.
items_en: 4. Requests the Committee to pay special attention to this issue and to mention the highlights in its annual report on the situation in the Non-Self-Governing Territories.

text_fr: 855eme seance  pleniere, 12  dhembre 1959.
text_en: 855th plenary session, 12 Dhember 1959.

text_fr: 1465  (XIV).  Diffusion,  dans  les  territoires  non autonomes,  d'informations  sur  l'Organisa· tion des Nations  Unies
text_en: 1465 (XIV). Dissemination of information on the United Nations Organization in the Non-Self-Governing Territories

text_fr: L 'A ssemblee  generate,
text_en: The A-semblee generate,

text_fr: Rappelant les  obligations,  enumerees au  Chapitre  XI de la  Charte des  Nations Unies, que Jes  Etats Membres ayant  ou  assumant  la  responsabilite  d'administrer des territoires  non  autonomes  ont  acceptees a l'egard des habitants  de  ces  territoires,
text_en: Recalling the obligations which my Member States, having or assuming the responsibility to administer Non-Self-Governing Territories, have accepted in respect of the inhabitants of those Territories, listed in Chapter XI of the Charter of the United Nations,

text_fr: Reaffirmant le principe  de  la  primaute  des  interets des habitants de  ces  territoires,
text_en: Reaffirming the principle of the primacy of the interests of the inhabitants of those territories,

text_fr: Jugeant necessaire  d'accelerer  le  progres  politique, economique  et  social  de  ces  habitants  et  le  developpe› ment de  leur instruction,  ainsi  que  le  prevoit la  Charte,
text_en: Considering that it is necessary to accelerate the political, economic and social progress of these inhabitants and the development of their education, as provided for in the Charter,

text_fr: Rappelant le  principe  qui  est a la  b?,Se  de  l'activite de  !'Organisation des  Nations  Unies  clans  le  domaine de  !'information, a savoir  que  !'Organisation ne  peut atteinclre  Jes  buts  pour  lesquels  elle  a  ete  creee  que  si Jes  peuples  du  moncle  sont  informes  de  ses  objectifs  et de  ses  activites,
text_en: Recalling the principle of the activity of the United Nations in the field of information, that is, that the Organization can only achieve my goals for which it was created if my peoples of the Moncle are informed of its objectives and activities,

text_fr: C onsiderant  par  consequent qu'il  est  important  que Jes  peuples  des  territoires  non  autonomes  soient  large› ment  informes  sur  !'Organisation des  Nations  U nies,
text_en: It is therefore important for the peoples of the Non-Self-Governing Territories to be fully informed about the Organization of the United Nations,

items_fr: I. Prie Jes  Etats Membres administrants de  prendre Ies mesures  necessaires a la  diffusion  d'informations sur  !'Organisation des  Nations  Unies  parmi  Jes  habi› tants  des  territoires  non  autonomes  et  de  rechercher a cette  fin la  participation  et  l'appui  actifs  des  organi› sations  qui  representent  ces  habitants;

2. Appelle  !'attention des  Etats  Membres  adminis› trants  sur  Jes  recommandations  qui  figurent  au  para› graphe  54  de  la  deuxieme partie du  rapport  redige en 1959  par  le  Comite  des  renseignements  relatifs  aux territoires  non  autonomes 31 , et  Ies prie  de  commu› niquer  au  Secretaire  general  des  renseignements  sur la  mise  en  ceuvre  de  ces  recommandations;

3. Prie le  Secretaire general  d'etablir, p<'>ur  la  quin› zieme  session  de  l'Assemblee  generale,  un  rapport special  sur  l'etat actuel  de  la  diffusion,  dans  Jes  terri› toires  non  autonomes,  d'informations  relatives a !'Or› ganisation  des  Nations  Unies  et  sur  Jes nouvelles mesures  qui  seraient  necessaires  a cette  fin.
items_en: I. Requests my administering Member States to take the necessary measures for the dissemination of information on the United Nations among the members of the Non-Self-Governing Territories and to seek for this purpose the active participation and support of the organizations representing those inhabitants;

2. Draws the attention of the administrative Member States to the recommendations contained in paragraph 54 of Part Two of the report prepared by the Committee on Information on Non-Self-Governing Territories in 1959, and requests that the Secretary-General be informed of the implementation of these recommendations;

3. Requests the Secretary-General to prepare, at the fifty-ninth session of the General Assembly, a special report on the current state of dissemination, in the Non-Self-Governing Territories, of information on the Organization of the United Nations and on further measures that would be necessary for this purpose.

text_fr: 855eme  seance  plcniere, 12  dccembre  1959.
text_en: 855th plenary session, 12 December 1959.

text_fr: 1466  (XIV).  Participation  des  territoires  non autonomes  aux  lravaux  de  l'Organisation des Nations Unies et des institutions specia› lisees
text_en: 1466 (XIV). Participation of Non-Self-Governing Territories in the work of the United Nations and the specialized agencies

text_fr: L'Assemblee generate,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: Rappelant sa resolution 566  (VI) du 18  janvier 1952, et  notamment :
text_en: Recalling its resolution 566 (VI) of 18 January 1952, in particular:

items_fr: a) Le  premier  considerant,  clans  lequel  elle  prenait note  de  la  proposition  du  Secretaire  general  d'utiliser !'Organisation des  'Nations Unies  en  vue  d'encourager !'evolution,  par  des  moyens  pacifiques,  des  peuples
items_en: a) The first considerant, clans in which she took note of the proposal of the Secretary General to use !' Organization of the 'United Nations in order to encourage !' evolution, by peaceful means, of peoples
